title: Table S3: microfluidic RT-qPCR assay data for host genes
author: National Research Institute For Agriculture, Food And Environment
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Please find attached the file containing the RT-qPCR data for host gene analysis.   
  Each line correspond to one sample. For each sample you will find the following informations:  
 
  The sample name (-> "sample" column)  
  The quantified gene (-> "Genes" column)  
  The raw Ct value (-> "Ct" column)  
  The time post-infection in hours (-> "Time " column)  
  The viral strain used to infect the cells (-> "Viral_strain" column)  
  The virulence of the strain used to infect the cells (-> "Virulence" column)  
  The biological origin (piglet donor) of the analyzed cells (-> "Pig" column)  
  The value of fold change, relative to the "time = 0 hpi" condition (-> "FC" column)  
  The value of the log2 of the fold change (-> log2FC" column)  
  The classification of the considered host gene, according to the clustering analysis based on the log2FC expression, as shown in Fig 6 (-> "cluster" column)
